description: Hello! I'm Caroline Jordan, a Certified Health and Fitness Coach here to help you heal, grow, and kick butt in life. If you are looking for more energy, less stress, and a healthier mindset, you have come to the right place. I specialize in helping people find safe, effective ways to exercise. I am here to teach you how to use MOVEMENT AS MEDICINE for mental and physical well being. My mission is to help you develop a positive relationship to self and exercise that adds to the quality of your life. I can teach you how to drop the extremes, create lasting lifestyle change, and feel good in your skin. Through my Youtube channel you will learn how to challenge yourself in a healthy way and explore your full potential. Let’s get your mind, body, and spirit in great shape so you can love your life. description: Hi! I'm Francesca, a Registered Kinesiologist and Personal Trainer, and I'm here to help you find your exercise prescription to improve your posture, pain & performance. In the same way that you receive a prescription from your doctor, everyone has an ideal exercise dosage that accommodates their lifestyle and helps you to reach your goals. Whether you need to manage lower back pain, or simply need a quick tutorial for your top exercises, look no further! You'll learn the most efficient way to move better, feel healthy, & strong. Through an #exerciseismedicine mindset, you can improve your metabolism, reduce your risk for injuries and illnesses, and reach your optimal quality of life! Subscribe and hit the notification bell so you don't miss upcoming content. Feel free to email me at info@fitfxtraining.ca if there is something you are looking for. Get fitness tips to your inbox here: https://mailchi.mp/fitfxtraining/subscribe Yours in health and fitness, ~Francesca, R.Kin
